projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern responsive personal portfolio showcasing my skills, projects, and experience. Built using React, HTML, CSS with clean UI and smooth animations.

projects.title: NEPSE Stock Market Analysis System
projects.description: Data science-based analysis system for NEPSE stock market including data cleaning, visualization, trend analysis, and predictive insights using Python.

projects.title: Todo App with Local Storage
projects.description: A feature-rich todo application with task management, filtering, and persistent storage using browser localStorage.

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Machine learning-based movie recommendation system using collaborative filtering and content-based filtering techniques.

projects.title: Hospital Management System
projects.description: Database-driven hospital management system with patient records, doctor management, appointments, and billing system using SQL Server.

projects.title: E-commerce Website with Database Integration
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with product listing, cart system, authentication, and database integration using React and Django.

projects.title: Spaceship Game
projects.description: 2D arcade-style spaceship shooting game built using Python and Pygame with enemy AI, collision detection, and score tracking.

projects.title: Jewellery Shop Website
projects.description: Frontend website for a jewellery shop with modern UI design, product showcase, and responsive layout.
